query: SELECT c.id, c.code, c.title, c.totalLessons, COUNT(l.id) as actual_lessons, CASE WHEN COUNT(l.id) = 0 THEN 'NO LESSONS' WHEN COUNT(l.id) < c.totalLessons THEN 'INCOMPLETE' ELSE 'COMPLETE' END as status FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.displayOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.id, c.code, c.title, c.totalLessons, COUNT(l.id) as actual_lessons, CASE WHEN COUNT(l.id) = 0 THEN 'NO LESSONS' WHEN COUNT(l.id) < c.totalLessons THEN 'INCOMPLETE' ELSE 'COMPLETE' END as status FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.displayOrder;
